bypasses.reason: One-time bulk catalog import is run from an admin-only route during library onboarding; results in a single transaction with manual review.
bypasses.whyRuntimeNotRequired: Operation is bulk insert-only; no per-row guards/policies apply, and the path runs behind an admin-only gate audited separately.
bypasses.tenantBoundary: single-tenant import script; tenantId is supplied per row
